signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026, up from 2.0% in prior months but below 2.4% forecasts | NO | HIGH confidence** [1]

This March figure, reported around early April 2026, marks the most recent confirmed data amid Middle East-driven oil shocks pushing import prices higher, yet it stayed below expectations and the Bank of Korea's 2% target [1][4][5]. The Bank of Korea held i

signals.headline: Alpenglow consensus upgrade** for Solana was highlighted as of April 14, targeting 150ms finality, with network records
signals.raw:
Alpenglow consensus upgrade** for Solana was highlighted as of April 14, targeting 150ms finality, with network records of 167M monthly holders and 148M daily transactions; institutional SOL ETF holdings by BlackRock/Fidelity noted.[2] A **$280M hack** on Solana's Drift Protocol was reported April 1 via social engineering.[6]

signals.headline: Kremlin Welcomes US-Israel-Iran Two-Week Ceasefire Deal | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Kremlin Welcomes US-Israel-Iran Two-Week Ceasefire Deal | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Kremlin confirmed on April 8, 2026, that it welcomes a last-minute two-week ceasefire agreement between the US, Israel, and Iran, aimed at de-escalating tensions and shifting to diplomatic talks amid an oil supply crisis[1][3].
